3093540.name: Haven Core: Outlands
3093540.description:
One world, two truths. Your decision.

In HAVEN CORE: OUTLANDS, you return to a surface that no human has stepped upon for generations. The world of 2155 is a paradox: a vibrant nature has reclaimed the ruins of high technology, while in the background, the cold logic of a global AI network still hunts according to the rules of the past.

You begin your journey in the clinical safety of Sector 12—the first outpost of the bunker civilization. But beyond the reinforced gates lie the Outlands, where the forgotten descendants of those left behind live by their own unwritten laws.

Boundless Roleplay: Who will you become?

HAVEN CORE: OUTLANDS doesn't offer pre-defined paths; it provides the foundation for your own story. The system sets the stage—you bring the life.

  • Registered by the System or Hidden in Shadows: Whether you rise through the Clearance Levels as a loyal citizen or evade the watchful eyes of the cameras as a lawless Outcast is entirely up to you.

  • Your Character, Your Ambition: Utilize the deep Karma and Identity systems to make a name for yourself. Become a diplomatic mediator between factions, a ruthless information broker in the underground, or a pioneer uncovering the secrets of the "Black Zones."

  • Interaction Without Templates: We provide the tools for intense, high-stakes roleplay. From complex surveillance systems to improvised Outland technology—every mechanic is designed to foster social conflict, alliances, and deep storytelling.

  • A Living Ecosystem: The world reacts to you. Your actions influence your reputation with Haven Core and the factions of the surface. Be careful whom you trust—in a world ruled by misguided logic, the truth is often the most valuable commodity.

Discover the Unknown

What really happened during "The Shift"? What lurks within the signal loops of the ruins? HAVEN CORE: OUTLANDS leaves room for the explorers. Throughout the world, you will find fragments of a story that is far from over.

Choose your path. Accept the consequences. Shape the future. The gates of Haven-12 have opened. The Surface Protocol is active. It is time to take your place in a world that is neither dead nor alive.
